_comment: Copy this file to secrets.json (gitignored) and fill in the values you need. Leave a value as "" to skip it — an empty string counts as 'not set' (no bogus credential is sent). Any key can also be supplied via its environment variable instead of this file; the env var wins when both are present. See src/config_utils.py.
_ebird_key: REQUIRED for the eBird download. Request one at https://ebird.org/st/request. Env var: EBIRD_KEY.
_dataverse_token: OPTIONAL — only needed for RESTRICTED Harvard Dataverse files. Leave "" for public data. Env var: DATAVERSE_TOKEN.
_zenodo_token: OPTIONAL — only needed for RESTRICTED Zenodo records. Leave "" for public data (e.g. LUH-3, which is public). Env var: ZENODO_TOKEN.
